3279490.name: Strider - No Hating on Me (Full Song with Vocals)
3279490.description: Forever Epic Story is a Hip Hop/Pop group with a unique style and blend of melodic hooks, strong rap vocals and bass driven beats. Each song delivers a different story and tale to captivate and stimulate the imagination of the listener. Prepare to enter an epic journey into a world of creative sound and thought provoking lyrics. A never ending tale of inspiration, courage and fortitude, your Forever Epic Story now begins…
